channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped vehicles, 29th March
item.description:
These vehicles are dumped on double yellow lines in a clearly marked controlled parking zone. You can’t see oncoming traffic when turning into Lovelinch Close. What are parking control even doing to enforce parking in the area? Vehicles are dumped here because parking is not enforced and they are not towed. Yet residents have to pay for the privilege to park here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive parking + abandoned van, 29th March
item.description:
Van hasn’t moved in months. No permit for the block and over the white line. Makes it impossible for scooter to drive out in the motorcycle bay right beside it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pembury Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised car with no permit. Sitting with parking tickets, 29th March
item.description:
This car has been sitting here for a month with no permit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped box of rubble, 29th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a plastic container full of bricks and rubble ,this has been there for 4 days now , in the enterance to Hainault st (cul di sac ) enterance , next door to the bungalow in blanmarle rd ,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blanmerle Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all up the street, 29th March
item.description:
Large wood pallets all up the street. Washing machine on the corner. Really annoying!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 29th March
item.description:
House hold items. Large bits of wood. Littered up the street. Major hotspot for fly tipping these days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug use and broken main doors, 29th March
item.description:
I am reporting urgent health and safety concerns at my building. The garage gate and main entrance door are both faulty, allowing unauthorised access. As a result, individuals are entering the building, using drugs in communal areas, and leaving needles.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car idling, 29th March
item.description:
Person asleep in car and the engine is idling

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, York Street, Marylebone, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement again., 29th March
item.description:
Somehow third time this month. Now directly in the middle of the entrance. Looks like someone homeless

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newington Butts, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Favourite chicken shop business waste flytip, 29th March
item.description:
There is business waste from a Favourite chicken shop that has been strewn about the pavement. The appears to be business rubbish as there is clear evidence of McCain chip bags that would usually only be available for purchase in bulk by a business. This is a recurring problem and a nuisance where the council needs to take more serious action to stop it and prevent further incidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Equipment not fit for use, 28th March
item.description:
The zip wire is broken, and the tire swing is also broken and the younger climbing frame is all broken. Park needs updating. We pay enough council tax and spaces like these that are used by young families need to be maintained.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes in Chieveley Road, 28th March
item.description:
Down Chieveley Road we have many potholes that need fixing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign at dangerous angle, 28th March
item.description:
The Morecambe street sign is now leaning so much, it's a danger to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morecambe Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass every single weekend on the street, 28th March
item.description:
People are smashing glass on the pavment between my house to the bus stop on middeild way. It's the beginning of a ally way and it's a main hot spot for a bus stop and and school were children attended. It's disgusting It's every single weekend. Broken glass bottles wine bottles vodka bottles and glass cups. I'm so sick of it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Midfield Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping rubbish dumped, 28th March
item.description:
On the green area on Oxford Road rubbish everywhere attracts the foxes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard on corner, 28th March
item.description:
Of Densworth Grove and Town Road has been knocked out of the ground quite a few loose paving stones been moved as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Town Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th March
item.description:
Someone had left all their rubbish here and it’s been here for a few days now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Gardens, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged metal grate, 28th March
item.description:
Damaged metal grate cover needs replacing as it is becoming a trip hazard. Location is outside the Dun Buns takeaway shop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped unwanted sofa by tree on our street, 28th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish yet again on our street it’s near 19 Osterley Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osterley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay, 28th March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
